headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Kinder Morgan (KMI) Balancing AI-Fueled Gas Backlog With Ongoing Insider Stock Sales
summary: Kinder Morgan recently highlighted that its largely natural gas-focused, US$10.00 billion project backlog and heavily fee-based or hedged contracts position it to benefit from rising demand tied to AI data centers, LNG exports, and power generation, while insider filings showed continued share sales by a senior terminal executive over the past year. Together, these updates underscore a business model built around contracted, infrastructure-like cash flows that may appeal to investors even as...

headline: Stock Picks, Revisited: What Worked, and What’s Next
summary: American Airlines, Universal Technical Institute, and Kinder Morgan are the subject of this week’s look back at former stock picks.
